text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week continues to produce great results,
and her reputation has grown. However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Two towering walls continue to stand in her
way—El Condor Pasa, the Phantom Bird, and
Grass Wonder, the Beast.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa finally challenges Special Week to
battle it out at the Japan Cup!
